name: AAPT21FeedingAssessmentSchedule
title: AAP T21 Feeding Assessment Schedule
description: Feeding assessment or video swallow study when there is marked hypotonia or low weight (below the 5th percentile weight-for-length or BMI). No fixed schedule; ordered when these findings are present.

action.title: Feeding Assessment / Video Swallow Study
action.description: Order feeding assessment when marked hypotonia or underweight is documented.

expression.expression: %observations.where(code.coding.where(system='http://snomed.info/sct' and code='398152000').exists()).exists() or %observations.where(code.coding.where(system='http://loinc.org' and code='77606-2').exists() and valueQuantity.value < 5).exists() or %observations.where(code.coding.where(system='http://loinc.org' and code='59576-9').exists() and valueQuantity.value < 5).exists()
expression.description: Applies when any of the following observations exist: marked hypotonia (SNOMED 398152000), weight-for-length percentile below 5th (LOINC 77606-2 with value < 5), or BMI percentile below 5th (LOINC 59576-9 with value < 5). If any of these findings are documented, a feeding assessment is indicated.
